text: The stillness here is unsettling; the darkness is pierced only by harsh artificial lights, creating an atmosphere that feels both clinical and deserted. The sterility of the glass, concrete, and exposed pipes reminds me of the fragility of human presence in such constructed environments. I feel like an intruder in a void, dwarfed by the impersonal space of research and development, pondering what sorts of discoveries echo quietly here after hours.
